moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, is in its second week, building to the Men's and Women's Singles Finals this weekend.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Centre Court drama unfolding! It's finals week at Wimbledon, who are you backing for the trophy?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Is this the year for a British champion at Wimbledon? The tension is building as we head towards the finals!

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Glasgow Green prepares for TRNSMT Festival, Scotland's biggest music event, featuring a weekend of top artists from July 10-12.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Glasgow, are you ready?! TRNSMT Festival kicks off this Friday at Glasgow Green, bringing three days of incredible music! Who are you buzzing to see?

angles.name: Lineup Hype
angles.copy: The TRNSMT lineup is stacked this year! Get ready for a massive weekend of live music. Drop your must-see acts below!

moments.title: Wireless Festival Weekend
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival takes over Finsbury Park in London from July 10-12, bringing the biggest names in hip-hop, rap, R&B, and grime to the capital.

angles.name: London Hype
angles.copy: London, get ready to turn up! Wireless Festival is back at Finsbury Park this weekend. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Music Focus
angles.copy: The hottest artists are heading to Wireless this weekend! Expect non-stop bangers and epic performances. What's your top track from this year's lineup?

moments.title: The Open Championship Approaches
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins with practice rounds on July 12, leading to the main tournament at Royal Birkdale, Southport from July 16-19.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: The countdown is on for The Open! Royal Birkdale is set to host golf's greatest as the practice rounds begin this Sunday.

angles.name: UK Golf
angles.copy: Get ready for world-class golf! The Open Championship returns to Royal Birkdale next week. Who do you think will lift the Claret Jug?

moments.title: Happy 51st to 50 Cent
moments.blurb: American rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent, born Curtis Jackson, turns 51 today.

angles.name: Music Tribute
angles.copy: Big birthday shout out to the one and only 50 Cent, turning 51 today! What's your favourite track from the hip-hop icon?

angles.name: Career Highlights
angles.copy: From 'Get Rich or Die Tryin'' to global superstar, 50 Cent celebrates his 51st birthday today! Relive the hits that defined an era.

moments.title: Kevin Hart Turns 47
moments.blurb: Stand-up comedian and actor Kevin Hart celebrates his 47th birthday today.

angles.name: Comedy Icon
angles.copy: Huge laughs and a huge happy 47th birthday to the one and only Kevin Hart today! What's your favourite Kevin Hart stand-up special or movie?

angles.name: Movie Star
angles.copy: Celebrating the man who always brings the funny! Kevin Hart is 47 today. Which of his blockbuster films is your go-to?

moments.title: Burt Ward (Robin) is 81
moments.blurb: Burt Ward, best known for playing Robin in the iconic 1960s Batman TV series, turns 81 today.

angles.name: Nostalgia
angles.copy: Holy birthday, Batman! Burt Ward, our legendary Robin from the classic 60s TV show, is 81 today! What's your favourite 'Holy...' line?

moments.title: Ringo Starr's 86th Birthday
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday tomorrow, July 7th.

angles.name: Beatles Focus
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the one and only Ringo Starr turns 86! What's your all-time favourite Beatles track featuring his iconic drumming?

angles.name: Solo Career
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary Ringo Starr tomorrow! Beyond The Beatles, what's your favourite Ringo solo hit?

moments.title: Jaden Smith Turns 28
moments.blurb: Actor and musician Jaden Smith, son of Will Smith, celebrates his 28th birthday on July 8th.

angles.name: Youthful Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating Jaden Smith's 28th birthday on Wednesday! Actor, musician, fashion icon – what's your favourite Jaden moment?

moments.title: Kevin Bacon Turns 68
moments.blurb: Hollywood actor and musician Kevin Bacon celebrates his 68th birthday on July 8th.

angles.name: Actor Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 68th birthday to the legendary Kevin Bacon on Wednesday! From Footloose to Apollo 13, what's his most iconic role for you?

moments.title: Courtney Love is 62
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and rock icon Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Rock Queen
angles.copy: Happy 62nd birthday to the incomparable Courtney Love on Thursday! What's your favourite Hole anthem or solo track?

moments.title: Tom Hanks Turns 70
moments.blurb: Two-time Oscar-winning actor Tom Hanks, known for roles in 'Forrest Gump' and 'Cast Away', celebrates his 70th birthday on July 9th.

angles.name: Cultural Icon
angles.copy: A very happy 70th birthday to the national treasure, Tom Hanks, on Thursday! What's the Tom Hanks movie you can watch again and again?

moments.title: Arlo Guthrie's 79th Birthday
moments.blurb: American folk music legend Arlo Guthrie, son of Woody Guthrie, celebrates his 79th birthday on July 10th.

angles.name: Folk Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic folk singer Arlo Guthrie on Friday! 'Alice's Restaurant' or 'City of New Orleans' – which is your favourite?

moments.title: Suzanne Vega Turns 67
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for hits like 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', celebrates her 67th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Music Appreciation
angles.copy: Happy 67th birthday to the brilliant Suzanne Vega this Saturday! Her unique sound gave us classics like 'Luka'. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Richie Sambora is 67
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and rock legend Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday on July 11th.

angles.name: Rock Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 67th birthday to Bon Jovi's iconic former guitarist, Richie Sambora, this Saturday! What's your favourite Sambora guitar solo?

moments.title: Harrison Ford Turns 84
moments.blurb: Legendary actor Harrison Ford, star of 'Indiana Jones' and 'Star Wars', celebrates his 84th birthday on July 13th.

angles.name: Movie Legend
angles.copy: Happy 84th birthday to the one and only Harrison Ford on Monday! Han Solo, Indiana Jones, Rick Deckard – which role defines him for you?

moments.title: Linda Ronstadt is 80
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer Linda Ronstadt, known for her versatile voice across rock, folk, and country, celebrates her 80th birthday on July 15th.

angles.name: Voice of an Era
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 80th birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt on Wednesday! Her voice spanned genres and captivated millions. What's your favourite song?

moments.title: Stewart Copeland Turns 74
moments.blurb: The Police drummer and rock legend Stewart Copeland celebrates his 74th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to the legendary Stewart Copeland of The Police on Thursday! His drumming is unmistakable. What's your favourite track featuring his rhythm?

moments.title: Will Ferrell is 59
moments.blurb: Comedic actor Will Ferrell, known for roles in 'Anchorman' and 'Elf', celebrates his 59th birthday on July 16th.

angles.name: Comedy King
angles.copy: Stay classy! A very happy 59th birthday to the hilarious Will Ferrell on Thursday! What's the funniest Will Ferrell movie moment for you?
